calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, NOV-07-2012: APPELLANT MR. CUONG TU AKA CALVIN TU PHAN APPEARS ON HIS OWN BEHALF IN PROPRIA PERSONA; RESPONDENT MS. YU YING JIANG APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA;
CANTONESE LANGUAGE INTERPRETER CONRAD PHAN (BROTHER OF APPELLANT) APPEARS TO ASSIST APPELLANT DURING THE PROCEEDINGS; CANTONESE LANGUAGE INTERPRETER PERRY CHEN IS PRESENT TO ASSIST RESPONDENT MS. YU YING JIANG DURING THE PROCEEDINGS.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT IS MARKED BY THE CLERK AND RETAINED BY THE COURT FOR ITS REVIEW.

THEREUPON, AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER ACCEPTING AND READING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE FOR FURTHER REVIEW, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. ALL
EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT.

PRO TEM JUDGE JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Reset From Aug-23-12 To Sep-06-12 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
